summary: Iteration 2 regression + full feature verification. CRITICAL navbar centering bug from iteration 1 is CONFIRMED FIXED (navbar center diff = 0.0px on both 1920x1080 desktop and 390x844 mobile; theme-toggle-button and mobile-menu-toggle-button both fully within viewport bounds and clickable). All previously-blocked test areas now verified working: theme toggle (dark/light/system all apply correctly, localStorage 'portfolio-theme' persists correct value across reload), mobile hamburger menu (8 nav links + resume button, link click scrolls+closes menu, X closes without navigating), Stats section (6 cards count up correctly to 5+/3/6+/5/2/60%), Expertise Recharts RadarChart (8-axis polygon renders visually with correct labels: Backend Engineering, Cloud (AWS), AI/LLMs, Blockchain, Databases, Testing & QA, IoT, Security, matched by 8 percentage cards 95/85/80/72/87/84/70/78%), Certifications (5 cards with badge-check icons: Python, Cloud Computing, Red Hat System Administration, PoolParty Course 2 & 3), Achievements (6 cards: SIH 2022 Finalist, YI Innovation Hackathon 2020, Best Student Awardee GLS University, Special Achievement Award, Idea Presentation Recognition, Code Blue), Contact form (filled + submitted, 'Message sent!' toast appeared, form cleared, and MongoDB portfolio_db.contacts verified to contain the exact submitted document with all fields matching, then cleaned up), Cursor glow (mix-blend-difference div present and visible/opacity=1 on desktop, hidden via 'hidden md:block' class on mobile/touch), Project dialog (opens with full case-study details - challenge/solution/key achievements/architecture, correctly has NO github/demo links per resume data, closes via Escape key). Dark mode contrast audit across Hero, Skills, Projects, Stats, Expertise, Certifications, Achievements, Contact showed no unreadable text (all light text on dark backgrounds, good contrast throughout).
test_report_links: /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_api.py (unchanged, backend re-verification not needed per iteration scope)
critical_code_review_comments: Navbar.jsx fix (inset-x-0 + mx-auto instead of left-1/2 + -translate-x-1/2) is correct and avoids the Framer Motion transform-override conflict entirely - no residual issue.
CursorGlow.jsx has no data-testid attribute; recommend adding one (e.g. data-testid='cursor-glow') for future automated testing instead of relying on class selector '.mix-blend-difference'.
Minor from iteration 1 still open (not in this iteration's scope but noting for completeness): no rate-limiting on POST /api/contact.

success_rate.backend: not re-tested this iteration (100% in iteration 1, no backend changes)

test_credentials: Not applicable - no auth system on this public portfolio site.
seed_data_creation: Created one TEST_-prefixed contact document via live UI form submission to verify MongoDB persistence end-to-end; deleted it immediately after verification (portfolio_db.contacts, filter name regex 'TEST_').
context_for_next_testing_agent: All areas from iteration 1's action items and this iteration's full test scope are now verified passing. No open bugs. App is in a fully working, regression-free state across desktop and mobile viewports, light/dark/system themes, and all content sections. If a future iteration adds new features, focus testing there.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - this iteration only verified the fix, no new RCA needed. Original RCA from iteration 1 (Framer Motion inline transform override of Tailwind -translate-x-1/2) was correctly addressed by switching to inset-x-0 + mx-auto centering which does not rely on the transform CSS property at all, eliminating the conflict.
